items.title: It’s funny, growing up as an immigrant I developed a scarcity mindset around saving money…
items.title_zh: 有趣的是，作为一名移民长大，我养成了一种关于省钱的稀缺心态……
items.description: It’s funny, growing up as an immigrant I developed a scarcity mindset around saving money and resources. But when it comes to unlimited token plans and tokenmaxxing, it feels like a missed opportunity if I don’t burn as many tokens as poss…
items.description_zh: 有趣的是，作为一名移民，我在成长过程中形成了一种关于节省金钱和资源的稀缺心态。但当谈到无限的代币计划和代币最大化时，如果我不燃烧尽可能多的代币，感觉就像是错失了机会……

items.title: Quality is irrational” is a great way to describe it.
items.title_zh: “质量是非理性的”是一个很好的描述方式。
items.description: “Quality is irrational” is a great way to describe it. You have to have an irrational level of commitment to constantly choose quality and an irrational level of self-belief that controlling things top to bottom will yield better results t…
items.description_zh: “质量是非理性的”是一个很好的描述方式。你必须有一种非理性的承诺，不断地选择质量，并有一种非理性的自信，认为从上到下控制事情会产生更好的结果……

items.title: Another new idea to push the state of AI architectures forward.

items.description: Another new idea to push the state of AI architectures forward. Sakana released a model that effectively uses a mixture of models to get work done. You get a single API but then the work gets farmed out the model that best performs the tas…
items.description_zh: 另一个推动人工智能架构向前发展的新想法。 Sakana 发布了一个模型，该模型有效地使用混合模型来完成工作。您获得一个 API，但随后工作会被外包给最能执行任务的模型……
